title: Phase Gates: S, T, and General Phase Operations
description: Master phase gates that modify the relative phase between quantum states - essential for quantum algorithms and universal quantum computation.
learningObjectives: Understand how phase gates modify quantum states
Master S and T gates and their relationships
Implement general phase gates Rz(θ) and P(θ)
Visualize phase rotations on the Bloch sphere
Use phase gates in quantum circuits
